fixtures.title: Turn 5 (light history)
fixtures.notes: Two prior Q and A pairs with a recent user answer.

messages.text: I am ready for the interview.
Tell me about a time you improved a process.
I automated weekly reports and reduced manual work for the team.
Describe a challenging technical decision you made.
I chose a simpler caching strategy to cut latency with fewer moving parts.

fixtures.title: Turn 10 (full round)
fixtures.notes: Five Q and A pairs with a recent detailed user answer.

messages.text: Walk me through a project you led.
I led a migration to a shared auth gateway across 12 services.
We tracked incident rates and saw a 60 percent drop within two months.
Tell me about a technical tradeoff you made.
I prioritized reliability over feature speed to stabilize the release.
Describe a time you mentored someone.
I coached a junior engineer on debugging and testing strategies.
What would you do differently next time?
I would involve stakeholders earlier to reduce late scope changes.
